reviews.review_description: This is the kind of game that keeps on giving. The gameplay is easy to get used to with very simplistic controls. The amount of courses or putt putt to play are virtually unlimited. I have not created any courses myself yet but I noticed that they give you a great variety to create whatever you want. Absolutely worth it for the price and replay ability.

Fun game. As other reviewers have stated a driving range and putting green would be great additions 

As for the mini golf levels, not a fan of the “course in the sky” set up.  That step into nothingness feeling can affect some users. But other than that fun fun game

This game is great as long as you’re playing it with someone locally or online. I really wouldn’t suggest playing this with just yourself unless you love trying to get the best score possible on the holes.
Please add more Friction to the Ball...

I got this game cause I play play golf from time to time and I was happily impressed, the community is great and the map making is simple but it’s easy to make these amazing scenery for you golf courses, the campaign has a mix of regular and mini golf, the possibilities are limitless and that makes for constant change which will keep many people interested in the game for a while. The only recommendation I have is possibly put in advanced clubs like a real club set for advanced players

reviews.review_title: It’s like Wii Sports Golf but I’m there!
reviews.review_description:
I really love this game. The mechanics are perfect, not too realistic (I’ve never played golf so that’s a good thing, it looks hard!) but enough to feel super satisfying when you sink a chip from outside of the green.

The multiplayer is totally solid. Being able to be “present” with my brother who lives 400 miles away is amazing. There’s so many levels to play this will last us a long time. Performance is spot on too - some have said it looks like Rec Room, which is true but the difference is a solid frame rate and higher resolution.

Update: Lots of people are complaining about trouble lining up the ball but this is fixed in the most recent update. Now when you press the trigger, you’re taken to the ball but it places it in the middle of your guardian... you just walk to the ball and you’re in a safe place to swing. This is much more immersive as I can forget about smashing my TV and lose myself in the game.

There’s no need for the second set of controls because you can switch between clubs in the menu of the first one. If it was only the second set we wouldn’t have to sit and wait for them to change so we could go to the ball. I’m really bad at the game but the most annoying part about it is that when I mess up a shot I have to wait 15 minutes to shoot again and if while readjusting myself I accidentally tap the ball i have to do it again. I do not recommend this game until the tweak all the bugs out of it. It has a lot of potential but the developers seem to not be paying any attention to it.

developer_response.body: Hi,  I don't really understand your feedback about switching clubs and taking 15 minutes to shoot.  You can easily switch your clubs and adjusting yourself to hit the ball again is the same as in real life.  You simply move your body and hit the ball.

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite go-to games!
reviews.review_description: Always fun for a relaxing experience. I love everything about this game. Thousands of levels. I don't mind the player placement that other people are upset about. It's a relaxing golf game so I just take the extra second when needed to either step back from the ball or use the teleportation movement to move back just a little. Thanks for making this game available to the Quest!

It’s totally worth the price for the custom holes   alone making it over 2000 holes And local multiplayer.  Wish the shot line would disappear on your next shot there’s literally no reason it should stick around on your next shot it’s little distracting to look at.
Waste of 15 pounds ,
This is a fun golf game. I play just as bad in this as I do in real life... who knew.

reviews.review_title: Going to say the same thing...
reviews.review_description: So I'm going to say the same thing that everybody else is saying. The game can definitely be fun, but it definitely needs some tweaking. The teleport 2 ball option and position it places you when teeing off are terrible. You basically have to teleport around multiple times just to get into the correct position to hit the ball. Either that or have a large enough of a play space, and even with that there's so much walking around you would have to do that you eventually you would walk into a wall or something around you. I'm giving two stars until this is updated, it could definitely be upgraded once they fix that.

developer_response.body: Hi.  Thank you for your feedback.  Is your basic complaint about the teleporting the fact that you have to move your body in real life to align your shot?  The game is not designed to teleport you and align you to your next shot without you having to move.  If you find you're stuck in a wall, you can simply rotate the world with the left/right analog and find yourself out of the wall.

reviews.review_description: I am enjoying the pitch and putt style of half the holes but don't enjoy the crazy golf style of the rest , however this title does show the potential of a golf game in the future on the quest , although there are leaderboards for each hole I wish there were just pitch and putt only courses with stats and leaderboards.
Great game visuals are great and level builder is awesome but there are only 3 courses and multiplayer makes you wait for hours to find someone to play with.
This game was something I’ve been missing in my life. BUY IT!

This game is the only golf VR product that I have found, that allowed 18 hole golf, so I gave it try.  I should have trusted the negative reviews about the positioning issues and lack of putting accuracy.  It is flat out painful to get positioned over the ball properly.  60% of your time is getting over the ball, whether from a previous hit or off the Tee.  The putting is a joke, you barely tap the ball and it goes a mile.  I was spoiled by Top Golf and had hopes of a descent game but it did not work out.  To place the cherry on top, the game is not refundable.  Hopefully there will be updates and I didn’t actually wipe my behind with my $20 and flush it down the toilet.

This is a great VR game. You have to get acquainted with the controls but, after that you will be rolling. Using a club as if in RL is difficult as the controls bind together a little. Love the adjustable power options and ability to travel to your next shot. Overall, a must have !

I would love to see more club options and a two handed swing option.

reviews.review_title: Great game needs tweaking for 5 stars.
reviews.review_description: Great game. Only one gripe! Please set the player position ready for each shot. Literally every shot you are lined up on the ball. Meaning every shot you have to turn to your side (Like you were playing golf lol) then step back or teleport to line up. This takes up too much time and I can't see why the game can't position me better. I mean it knows I am right handed so why not set me up for a right handed swing. It may sound silly but doing this for every shot is the only thing that irritates me lol. It's such an easy thing to sort and it's a big time and energy waster. Hopefully you can update to make the control setup as great as the game. Literally every golf game I have played has been able to set up the next shot for you so can't see why this game is any different. The addition of a driving range to practise your swing would also be a great addition. If fixed I would happily turn my review to 5 stars but it's too much of a pain atm.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback.  The reason that we cannot predict the direction for the next shot is because of the user created holes.  In a traditional game, the developers know the layout of the course and know the direction from the teebox, along the fairway, and to the hole.  With user created holes, there is absolutely no way to predict the direction your next shot should take.  If you use the snap rotation to rotate yourself left/right instantly, it makes lining up the next shot really easy (don't need to move your feet)

reviews.review_title: Way more fun then I expected it
reviews.review_description: I just got this game and it’s already amazing! The music really makes it more enjoyable too! Honestly I expected just a normal golf kinda game but CloudLands 2 is way more fun then I expected it to be!
Absolutely amazing game, price is good  and great value for money, just played the make you own map feature and it was really fun love playing it with the family and all round a great game to have!
